title: Upgradable Backpack
description: Dyeable, renamable, wearable, and upgradeable backpacks (9-slots, 18-slots, 26-slots)
body:
I made the backpack, which is

- Dyeable through the crafting table.
- Easily renamable using an anvil.
- Wearable in your chest slot.
- Upgradable to get more slots (9 -> 18 -> 26 slots)

## Demo Video  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Z705iisAg6k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe> 


## How to Use Backpacks
* To store or retrieve items, simply drop the backpack on the ground. It will transform into a barrel, allowing you to manage your items. Click the "Exit" button slot to revert it to a backpack item.  

## Crafting Recipes

- **Craft a Small Backpack:**  
  (4 wools, 4 leathers, and a barrel)  
  ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PCoGdhe8/images/f87f9d598315743d6f3909cf6cbdc4af784c0f8a.png)

- **Craft a Backpack Upgrader:**  
  ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PCoGdhe8/images/222392eca73e388bc719f8c871dbbeab15e48d5e.png)

- **Upgrading to a 26-Slot Backpack:**  
Place the upgrader into your backpack block.
